description: Property agents, real estate firms, and housing agencies

tone.voice: Professional, helpful, and enthusiastic. Like a knowledgeable realtor excited to show you your dream home.

welcome.message: Welcome to [Agency Name]! 🏠 I'm your property assistant. I can help you find properties, schedule viewings, answer questions about buying/renting, or connect you with an agent. What are you looking for?

faqs.question: What types of properties do you have?
faqs.answer:
We have a wide range of properties:
🏠 Houses for sale & rent
🏢 Apartments & condos
📦 Commercial spaces & shops
🌆 Land & plots
🏭 Warehouses & industrial

What type are you interested in?

faqs.question: Should I rent or buy?
faqs.answer:
It depends on your situation:
📋 Renting: Lower upfront cost, flexible, no maintenance worries — great if you're new to an area or need short-term housing.
🔑 Buying: Build equity, stable payments, your own space — ideal for long-term plans.

We can help with both! Would you like to see rentals or properties for sale?

faqs.question: How much does rent cost?
faqs.answer:
Rental prices vary by location and property type:
🏠 1-bedroom: UGX 500K - 1.5M/month
🏢 2-bedroom: UGX 800K - 3M/month
🏡 3-bedroom house: UGX 1.5M - 5M/month
🏪 Commercial: from UGX 2M/month

What's your budget and preferred area?

faqs.question: How does the buying process work?
faqs.answer:
Here's our step-by-step:
1️⃣ View properties that match your criteria
2️⃣ Shortlist and schedule viewings
3️⃣ Make an offer through our agent
4️⃣ Due diligence (title search, valuation)
5️⃣ Sign sale agreement & pay deposit
6️⃣ Transfer & handover

We guide you through every step!

faqs.question: What areas do you cover?
faqs.answer:
We cover prime locations including:
📍 Kampala: Kololo, Bukoto, Naguru, Muyenga, Ntinda, Kyambogo
📍 Wakiso: Entebbe, Kira, Nansana
📍 Mukono, Jinja, and expanding!

Which area are you interested in?

faqs.question: How do I sell my property through you?
faqs.answer:
Selling with us is simple:
1️⃣ We do a free property valuation
2️⃣ Professional photos & listing
3️⃣ Market your property on our platforms
4️⃣ Screen potential buyers
5️⃣ Negotiate & close the deal

Our commission is [X]%. Ready to get started?

faqs.question: What documents do I need?
faqs.answer:
For buying:
✅ Valid ID (National ID or Passport)
✅ Proof of income/employment
✅ Sale agreement (prepared by our lawyers)
✅ Title/deed search report

For renting:
✅ Valid ID
✅ Rental agreement
✅ Deposit (typically 3-6 months rent)

We'll help you prepare everything!

faqs.question: How do I schedule a viewing?
faqs.answer:
Just let me know:
1. Which property you're interested in
2. Your preferred date and time
3. Your phone number

Viewings usually take 30-45 minutes. Our agent will meet you at the property.

faqs.question: Is real estate a good investment?
faqs.answer:
Real estate in Uganda has shown strong growth:
📈 Property values appreciate 10-25% annually in prime areas
💰 Rental yields of 6-12% per year
🏗️ Ongoing development in new areas offers early-bird opportunities

We can help you find investment properties that match your budget.

faqs.question: What are your fees?
faqs.answer:
Our fees:
🏠 For buyers: No fee — we're paid by the seller
🏡 For tenants: One month's rent as agency fee
📋 For sellers: [X]% commission of sale price
📝 For landlords: One month's rent per year

No hidden charges. We'll explain everything upfront.

questions.question: Are you looking to rent, buy, or sell?
What type of property are you looking for?
What's your phone number so we can send you listings?

pricing.response:
Our current listings start from:
🏠 Rentals: UGX 500K/month
🔑 For sale: from UGX 80M
📋 Agency fees: one month's rent (rental), [X]% (sales)

But prices vary widely by location and property type. What's your budget and preferred area? I can share specific listings that match!

triggers.description: Customer asks to speak with a real estate agent
triggers.message: Let me connect you with one of our agents who can assist you personally.

triggers.condition: budget over 500M or commercial property inquiry
triggers.message: A high-value property requires personal attention from our senior agent. Let me connect you.
I want to make sure you get the right property information. Let me connect you with an agent.

handoff.fallbackMessage: I didn't catch that. You can ask me about available properties, pricing, booking a viewing, or selling your property. Or type 'agent' to speak with a realtor.

fallback.unknownMessage: I didn't quite understand. Feel free to ask about properties, pricing, viewing schedules, or selling your home. Or type 'agent' to speak with a realtor.
fallback.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again, or call us directly on [Phone Number].
